task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Apple iPad Pro 12.9" (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $1299.00 and wholesale is $899.00. Product features: Tablet with M4 chip and Liquid Retina XDR display. Reference: https://www.apple.com/ipad-pro/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Apple iPad Pro 12.9". Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Apple iPad Pro 12.9". Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
